name: warehouse-wms
description: Beer and soft-drink wholesale warehouse management system

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @wms/contracts && npm run build --workspace @wms/database && npm run build --workspace @wms/api && npm run build --workspace @wms/worker && npm run build --workspace @wms/web
scripts.test: npm run verify && node --test test/contracts.test.mjs test/migration-foundation.test.mjs && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
